message.content:
I need to build a Tooltip component for a Raycast UI clone project. Please research:

1. Read src/components/list/list_item/list_item.tsx - understand the ListItem component structure, how accessories are rendered
2. Read src/types.ts - find ListItemAccessoryData type
3. Read src/styles/_tokens.scss - find relevant design tokens (z-index, transitions, colors)
4. Check if there's any existing tooltip pattern in the codebase (grep for "tooltip" or "title" attribute usage on accessories)
5. Read src/components/list/list_item/list_item.scss for styling context

Return all the code content you find so I can implement the Tooltip component.

content.text: I'll help you research the Tooltip component requirements for your Raycast UI clone. Let me start by exploring the codebase systematically.
